description.en: Auditable change history for cast-a-doc product scope, implementation behavior, planning documents, release surface, validation, and compatibility impact.
description.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 的可审计变更历史，覆盖产品范围、实现行为、规划文档、发布界面、验证和兼容性影响。

body.en: This page is an audit log, not a marketing card list.
body.zh-CN: 本页是审计日志，不是营销式卡片列表。

body.en: `site/changelist.json` is the durable source; `changelist.html` is the generated artifact.
body.zh-CN: `site/changelist.json` 是长期源文件；`changelist.html` 是生成产物。

text.en: Every meaningful change must record what changed, why it mattered, affected files or surfaces, validation evidence, compatibility impact, and rollback or recovery notes. Cosmetic-only updates may be grouped, but implementation behavior, JSON contracts, validation gates, installers, Pages output, or skill invocation rules need their own row.
text.zh-CN: 每个有意义的变化都必须记录变更内容、为什么重要、影响文件或界面、验证证据、兼容性影响，以及回滚或恢复说明。纯展示调整可以合并；但实现行为、JSON 契约、验证门禁、安装器、Pages 输出或 skill 调用规则变化需要单独成行。

items.en: Use the current-iteration table for active release and review work.
items.zh-CN: 当前发布和审查工作写入当前迭代表。

items.en: Keep older entries grouped only after their validation and compatibility impact have been captured.
items.zh-CN: 只有已记录验证和兼容性影响的旧条目，才可以合并进历史分组。

items.en: Do not replace changelist entries with session progress notes; progress belongs in handoff notes or TODO when unresolved.
items.zh-CN: 不要用会话进度笔记替代 changelist；可恢复进度应进入交接记录，未决事项应进入 TODO。

rows.en: This changelist-audit pass replaces the unstructured values-grid history with an auditable table and explicit entry contract.
rows.zh-CN: 本次 changelist 审计将无结构 values-grid 历史改为可审计表格，并补充明确记录规范。

rows.en: `site/changelist.json`, generated `changelist.html`, and public Pages changelist readability.
rows.zh-CN: `site/changelist.json`、生成的 `changelist.html`，以及公开 Pages changelist 可读性。

rows.en: Run JSON validation, render freshness, HTML validation, visual lint, and fixture checks before commit.
rows.zh-CN: 提交前运行 JSON 校验、渲染新鲜度、HTML 校验、视觉 lint 和 fixture 检查。

rows.en: No JSON contract or renderer behavior change; rollback is restoring the previous `site/changelist.json` plus regenerated HTML.
rows.zh-CN: 不改变 JSON 契约或渲染器行为；回滚方式是恢复上一版 `site/changelist.json` 并重新生成 HTML。

rows.en: `217231a` added gates that reject raw Mermaid, PlantUML, Graphviz, and flowchart source when published as visible code or preformatted fallback.
rows.zh-CN: `217231a` 新增门禁，拒绝把 Mermaid、PlantUML、Graphviz 和 flowchart 源码作为可见 code 或 preformatted fallback 发布。

rows.en: JSON validator, HTML profile validator, component references, public README/TODO/CHANGELIST, installable skill bundle, and SVG sanitizer tests.
rows.zh-CN: JSON validator、HTML profile validator、组件参考、公开 README/TODO/CHANGELIST、可安装 skill bundle 和 SVG sanitizer 测试。

rows.en: CI passed for document validation, rendered fixture freshness, visual lint, package metadata, skill bundle sync, and unit tests.
rows.zh-CN: CI 已通过文档校验、渲染产物新鲜度、视觉 lint、包元数据、skill bundle 同步和单元测试。

rows.en: Intentionally stricter validation: raw diagram source must migrate to a `diagram` block rendered as SVG.
rows.zh-CN: 有意收紧校验：原始图表源码必须迁移到渲染为 SVG 的 `diagram` block。

rows.en: `10c5106` documented single-skill multi-tool routing and promoted JSON validation to the first required gate.
rows.zh-CN: `10c5106` 记录单 skill 多工具路由，并把 JSON 校验提升为第一道必要门禁。

rows.en: `SKILL.md`, `references/tool-entrypoints.md`, `references/json-contract.md`, README, TODO, verification spec, generated Pages artifacts, and installed skill bundle.
rows.zh-CN: `SKILL.md`、`references/tool-entrypoints.md`、`references/json-contract.md`、README、TODO、验证方案、生成 Pages 产物和安装版 skill bundle。

rows.en: Local gates passed and Pages deploy was verified against cache-busted public URLs.
rows.zh-CN: 本地门禁通过，并通过带缓存参数的公开 URL 验证 Pages 部署。

rows.en: No CLI command was renamed; direct Python script usage remains supported.
rows.zh-CN: 没有重命名 CLI 命令；继续支持直接使用 Python 脚本。

rows.en: Core module split
rows.zh-CN: 核心模块拆分

rows.en: `e737a72`, `49a6236`, and `dd54883` moved shared helpers, rendering, validation, profile, theme, diagram, shell, and CLI behavior out of the former oversized `cast_docs_core.py`, then synchronized the installable skill bundle.
rows.zh-CN: `e737a72`、`49a6236` 和 `dd54883` 将共享 helper、渲染、校验、profile、theme、diagram、shell 和 CLI 行为从原来的超大 `cast_docs_core.py` 中拆出，并同步可安装 skill bundle。

rows.en: Compatibility facade remains in `cast_docs_core.py`; fixture freshness and skill bundle sync checks guard drift.
rows.zh-CN: `cast_docs_core.py` 保持兼容 facade；fixture 新鲜度和 skill bundle 同步检查防止漂移。

rows.en: Release and install trust
rows.zh-CN: 发布与安装可信度

rows.en: `5f9441d` and `4d7f4b7` added release metadata, `VERSION`, `RELEASE.md`, and auditable pinned install guidance before one-line installer shortcuts.
rows.zh-CN: `5f9441d` 和 `4d7f4b7` 新增发布元数据、`VERSION`、`RELEASE.md`，并把可审计 pinned 安装方式放到一键安装快捷方式前。

rows.en: Existing script entrypoints remain supported; installer behavior delegates to GitHub CLI skill install paths.
rows.zh-CN: 继续支持现有脚本入口；安装器行为委托给 GitHub CLI skill 安装路径。

rows.en: Schema, SVG, and CI hardening
rows.zh-CN: Schema、SVG 与 CI 加固

rows.en: `3471d8d`, `4de3858`, and `6bc88a4` clarified schema/Python validator boundaries, replaced raw SVG passthrough with allowlist sanitization, and added GitHub Actions fixture validation gates.
rows.zh-CN: `3471d8d`、`4de3858` 和 `6bc88a4` 明确 schema/Python validator 边界，将 raw SVG 透传替换为白名单 sanitizer，并新增 GitHub Actions fixture validation gates。

rows.en: Behavior is intentionally safer; SVG or schema changes require focused tests and refreshed fixtures.
rows.zh-CN: 行为有意更安全；SVG 或 schema 变化需要聚焦测试和刷新 fixture。

rows.en: Planning and public site
rows.zh-CN: 规划与公开站点

rows.en: Earlier planning updates added `plan/`, `spec/`, public navigation, README/TODO/CHANGELIST HTML views, and project style profile guidance.
rows.zh-CN: 早期规划更新新增 `plan/`、`spec/`、公开导览、README/TODO/CHANGELIST HTML 阅读页，以及项目样式 profile 指引。

rows.en: These are documentation-surface changes; source JSON plus generated HTML must remain synchronized.
rows.zh-CN: 这些属于文档界面变化；源 JSON 与生成 HTML 必须保持同步。

items.en: Released the initial skill via GitHub CLI install paths and tagged `v0.1.0`.
items.zh-CN: 通过 GitHub CLI 安装路径发布初始 skill，并打 `v0.1.0` tag。

items.en: Added install page, homepage cross-links, chapter icons, topbar identity, inline-code rendering fixes, and the initial public GitHub Pages site.
items.zh-CN: 新增安装页、首页交叉链接、章节图标、顶栏身份、inline-code 渲染修复，以及初始公开 GitHub Pages 站点。

items.en: Created the initial planning workspace from the project prompt and adopted JSON plus generated HTML as the public status source.
items.zh-CN: 根据项目 prompt 创建初始规划工作区，并采用 JSON 加生成 HTML 作为公开状态源。
